name: Green Salsa
recipeIngredient: 2 Jalapeno peppers, cut lengthwise and seeded
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring a pot of salted water to a boil on the stove.
2. Add the tomatillos and chili peppers, cover, and cook for 2 minutes.
3. Drain the tomatillos and chiles, then place them in a food processor and puree.
4. Strain the puree into a bowl and discard any skins.
5. Add the onion, cilantro, lemon juice, oil, and salt. Stir until well combined.
6. Chill before serving. Makes 2 cups.
